name: MITRE ATT&CK Technique Mapping
description: Maps incoming security alerts to MITRE ATT&CK techniques, tactics, and procedures. The playbook extracts alert details, uses AI to identify applicable ATT&CK techniques, enriches with technique-specific context including known threat groups and mitigations, then annotates the alert with full TTP mapping. High-severity technique matches (e.g., lateral movement, privilege escalation) trigger automatic escalation with defensive recommendations. Lower-severity matches are documented for threat hunting reference.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: MITRE ATT&CK
required_integrations.reason: Map alert behaviors to ATT&CK techniques and retrieve technique details, mitigations, and detection guidance

config.description: Triggers on any security alert for MITRE ATT&CK technique mapping and TTP enrichment

config.code:
alert = inputs.get('alert', {})

behaviors = {
    'alert_type': alert.get('type', 'unknown'),
    'alert_title': alert.get('title', ''),
    'description': alert.get('description', ''),
    'source': alert.get('source', ''),
    'severity': alert.get('severity', 'medium'),
    'affected_host': alert.get('hostname', alert.get('host', '')),
    'affected_user': alert.get('username', alert.get('user', '')),
    'process_name': alert.get('process_name', ''),
    'command_line': alert.get('command_line', ''),
    'network_activity': alert.get('network', {}),
    'file_activity': alert.get('file_operations', []),
    'registry_activity': alert.get('registry_changes', []),
    'existing_tags': alert.get('tags', [])
}

result = behaviors
config.description: Extracts all behavioral indicators from the alert including process activity, network activity, file operations, and registry changes

config.additional_instructions: Analyze all alert behaviors and map to specific MITRE ATT&CK techniques. For each identified technique, provide: technique ID (e.g., T1059.001), technique name, tactic, confidence level, and rationale. Identify the full kill chain progression if multiple tactics are present.
config.description: AI-powered analysis mapping alert behaviors to specific MITRE ATT&CK techniques with confidence levels and kill chain context
Enriches identified techniques with full ATT&CK context including known threat groups, mitigations, detection methods, and related techniques
Routes based on whether the mapped techniques indicate high-severity tactics requiring immediate escalation

config.additional_instructions: Generate defensive recommendations for the identified high-severity ATT&CK techniques. Include specific mitigations, detection rules to implement, and immediate response actions. Reference relevant ATT&CK mitigations by ID.
config.description: AI-generated defensive recommendations with specific mitigations and detection guidance for the identified techniques

create_ticket.title: ATT&CK Mapping: {{analyze_1.primary_technique}} — {{code_1.outputs.result.alert_title}}

config.description: Escalates the alert with full TTP context and defensive recommendations for SOC Tier 2 investigation
Annotates the alert with the full TTP mapping for threat hunting reference without escalation
